item.title: Gas Station Mystery Solved After 5 Decades
item.description: A long-unsolved gas station mystery is finally resolved after five decades, bringing closure to a case that remained open for years.

media:content.media:title: Gas Station Mystery Solved After 5 Decades
media:content.media:description: A long-unsolved gas station mystery is finally resolved after five decades, bringing closure to a case that remained open for years.

item.title: What Happened to Robbie Brown?
item.description: A look at the unanswered questions surrounding Robbie Brown’s case and the details available so far.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to Robbie Brown?
media:content.media:description: A look at the unanswered questions surrounding Robbie Brown’s case and the details available so far.

item.title: Mother and Son Identified After 20 Years
item.description: A mother and son’s remains were identified after 20 years, bringing long-awaited answers to the case.

media:content.media:title: Mother and Son Identified After 20 Years
media:content.media:description: A mother and son’s remains were identified after 20 years, bringing long-awaited answers to the case.

item.title: The Unanswered Mystery of Haidar Abushaqra
item.description: A respectful look at the unanswered questions surrounding Haidar Abushaqra and the details shared in this case.

media:content.media:description: A respectful look at the unanswered questions surrounding Haidar Abushaqra and the details shared in this case.
